description_long: This is a compact, two-seater city car with a playful and celebratory design, featuring a predominantly brown and white exterior with yellow lightning bolt graphics on the sides. The rear window displays the phrase 'just married' in red script, and the license plate reads 'fortwo.' The side windows are decorated with the words 'HAPPY CAR' in colorful letters and 'I love this car' in gold script. The car has a rounded, modern shape with large windows, small wheels, and a short wheelbase, typical of urban microcars. The front and rear lights are integrated into the body, and the car has a single visible antenna on the roof. The overall appearance suggests a lightweight, maneuverable vehicle designed for city driving and special occasions.
description: A compact, celebratory city car with brown, white, and yellow graphics, 'just married' signage, and playful side decorations. It features a rounded, modern design with large windows and small wheels.
description_view_0: Rear view showing 'just married' text, 'fortwo' license plate, and taillights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting 'HAPPY CAR' and 'I love this car' text, yellow lightning bolt graphic, and two doors.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the car's rounded nose, headlights, and yellow triangular graphic.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with 'HAPPY CAR' and 'I love this car' text and lightning bolt graphic.
attribute_headlight_design: dual rounded headlights integrated into the front corners
